testcase.name: test_v1_config_public

failure.message: AssertionError: /v1/config not routed to backend via public ingress (got text/html). Frontend remote config call will silently fall back. assert 'application/json' in 'text/html'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_plump_api.py:43: in test_v1_config_public assert "application/json" in ctype, ( E AssertionError: /v1/config not routed to backend via public ingress (got text/html). Frontend remote config call will silently fall back. E assert 'application/json' in 'text/html'

testcase.name: test_v1_events_public

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'application/json' in 'text/html' + where 'text/html' = get('content-type', '') + where get = {'Date': 'Mon, 29 Jun 2026 12:48:50 GMT', 'Content-Type': 'text/html', 'Transfer-Encoding': 'chunked', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'CF-Ray': 'a1350c3d5f6a6501-ORD', 'CF-Cache-Status': 'DYNAMIC', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate', 'Expires': '0', 'Server': 'cloudflare', 'Via': '1.1 google', 'Pragma': 'no-cache', 'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': '*', 'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, HEAD, PATCH', 'Access-Control-Max-Age': '300', 'surrogate-control': 'no-store', 'x-content-type-options': 'nosniff', 'set-cookie': '__cf_bm=bfthpNQCpIWbMgDCBAcIn6wUYpwu1Xzgm1Z3brdk6QA-1782737330.7793067-1.0.1.1-lvc_.7gbjKnKsKHIEAly0HUMpkboxyRqb8NQ4ScYkOvAEmOvCMPpuzQM7O9DgX02SYplTq2kHJn.0DQ4t.lBwpaES0zNvvsviFkyivw3lYdrG4quzl.TmcXkIonYhKXj;
